# AI Contributor Spec

> Guardrails for repositories where AI reads, writes, reviews, or releases code.

## Docs

### Start

- [Overview](https://ai-contributors.dev/ai-contributor-spec/docs/)
- [Quickstart](https://ai-contributors.dev/ai-contributor-spec/docs/quickstart)
- [Adoption guide](https://ai-contributors.dev/ai-contributor-spec/docs/adoption-guide)

### Specification

- [Full specification](https://ai-contributors.dev/ai-contributor-spec/specification)
- [Pillars overview](https://ai-contributors.dev/ai-contributor-spec/docs/pillars)
- [Levels overview](https://ai-contributors.dev/ai-contributor-spec/docs/conformance-levels)
- [Coverage map](https://ai-contributors.dev/ai-contributor-spec/docs/coverage-map)
- [Rule catalog](https://ai-contributors.dev/ai-contributor-spec/docs/rule-catalog)
- [Threat model template](https://ai-contributors.dev/ai-contributor-spec/docs/threat-model)

### Audit

- [How the audit works](https://ai-contributors.dev/ai-contributor-spec/docs/audit-overview)
- [The profile](https://ai-contributors.dev/ai-contributor-spec/docs/profile)
- [No-install prompt](https://ai-contributors.dev/ai-contributor-spec/audit/prompt)
- [A stamped audit](https://ai-contributors.dev/ai-contributor-spec/docs/stamped-audit)

### Skills

- [ai-contributor-audit-profile](https://ai-contributors.dev/ai-contributor-spec/docs/skill-profile)
- [ai-contributor-audit](https://ai-contributors.dev/ai-contributor-spec/docs/skill-audit)
- [ai-contributor-audit-fix](https://ai-contributors.dev/ai-contributor-spec/docs/skill-fix)

### Project

- [Release Changelog](https://ai-contributors.dev/ai-contributor-spec/docs/releases)
- [Contributing](https://ai-contributors.dev/ai-contributor-spec/docs/contributing)
- [Authors](https://ai-contributors.dev/ai-contributor-spec/docs/authors)
- [Tooling](https://ai-contributors.dev/ai-contributor-spec/docs/tooling)
- [Security policy](https://ai-contributors.dev/ai-contributor-spec/docs/security-policy)
- [Glossary](https://ai-contributors.dev/ai-contributor-spec/docs/glossary)
- [Published pages](https://ai-contributors.dev/ai-contributor-spec/docs/doc-coverage)
